entries.title: [codex] fix release deploy dispatch and env reminders
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: Add `workflow_dispatch` support to `Build and Deploy` so a release tag can be deployed explicitly.
Trigger `deploy.yml` from the release metadata workflow after a new release tag and GitHub Release are created.
Track merged PR env-related file changes in the generated changelog and surface them in deployment notifications as a manual server `.env.production` sync reminder.
features: Add `workflow_dispatch` support to `Build and Deploy` so a release tag can be deployed explicitly.
ops: Trigger `deploy.yml` from the release metadata workflow after a new release tag and GitHub Release are created.
Track merged PR env-related file changes in the generated changelog and surface them in deployment notifications as a manual server `.env.production` sync reminder.
verification: Ruby YAML parse for both changed workflow files
pre-push `pnpm run ci:check` passed: 216 suites, 2515 tests

entries.title: 验证工作流增强 + 数据集策展硬闸门
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: `76599765` enhance test suite validation workflow — 扩展验证流程（新增 `validation_title` 字段 + DB migration、重写 ExecutionDetailViewer / ReviewModal / ConversationList 等前端组件、完善 test-batch/import/write-back service、补充大量单测）
`ca6fb3a3` tighten validation dataset curation gate — 收紧 `analyze-chat-badcases` skill 的数据集策展规则
原分支 `codex/release-v5.2.1-clean` 与 `origin/codex/release-v5.2.1-clean` 发散严重（双方 PR #111/#112 hash 不同），但 develop 已带有这两个 PR 的等价/更新版本，无需重复合入
只挑取 develop 真正缺失的 2 个 test-suite commit
features: `76599765` enhance test suite validation workflow — 扩展验证流程（新增 `validation_title` 字段 + DB migration、重写 ExecutionDetailViewer / ReviewModal / ConversationList 等前端组件、完善 test-batch/import/write-back service、补充大量单测）
`ca6fb3a3` tighten validation dataset curation gate — 收紧 `analyze-chat-badcases` skill 的数据集策展规则
只挑取 develop 真正缺失的 2 个 test-suite commit
ops: 原分支 `codex/release-v5.2.1-clean` 与 `origin/codex/release-v5.2.1-clean` 发散严重（双方 PR #111/#112 hash 不同），但 develop 已带有这两个 PR 的等价/更新版本，无需重复合入
